<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset=utf-8>
    <meta http-equiv=X-UA-Compatible content="IE=edge">
    <meta name=viewport content="shrink-to-fit=no,width=device-width,height=device-height,initial-scale=1,user-scalable=1">
    <meta name="robots" content="noindex">
    <title>##title##</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet preload prefetch" href="https://tomasino.org/styles.css" as="style" type="text/css" crossorigin="anonymous">
    <link rel="canonical" href="##canonical##">
<style>
th, td {
  position: relative;
  cursor: pointer;
}
.book-meta {
  border: 1px solid currentColor;
  padding: 1rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 1.5rem;
  background: transparent;
  color: inherit;
  opacity: .92;
}
.book-meta h1 {
  margin: 0 0 .75rem;
  color: inherit;
}
.book-meta dl {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: max-content 1fr;
  gap: .3rem .75rem;
  margin: 0;
}
.book-meta dt {
  font-weight: 700;
  color: inherit;
}
.book-meta dd {
  margin: 0;
  color: inherit;
}
.book-stars {
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
}
.book-rating-num {
  opacity: 0.85;
}
</style>
  </head>
  <body>
    <div class="page-wrapper">
      <a class="back" href="/">HOME</a>
##content##
    </div>
    </body>
  </head>
</html>
